description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite cartoon character- this pair of sandals from ben 10 will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and footbed, these sandals offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Navy blue sandals with Ben 10 design on upper Red ankle straps with branding One piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Nubs on outsole with branding Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon character- this pair of sandals from Ben 10 will be an instant hit.
